description: The Largest and most stunning townhome layouts in Willoughby. This meticulously kept 4 bedroom, 4 bathroom + den home offers exceptional design w/ countless upgrades. Enjoy over 700 sqft rooftop patio w/ gas BBQ hookup and hot tub rough in, plus a side by side double garage (EV ready). Features include 9 ft ceilings, highly efficient radiant in floor heating, heat pump w/ A/C, and hot water on demand for year-round comfort. Laminate and tile flooring throughout. The lower level offers a spacious bedrm w/ full bath, while the main level features open concept living, large pantry, powder room, & generous den. Prime walkable location steps to parks, trails, schools including Josette Dandurand Elementary, shopping, transit, and minutes to Hwy 1. A rare opportunity in an unbeatable location
